title: oreocharis flavovirens
intro: Oreocharis flavovirens, also known as the Yellow-green Oreocharis, is a type of plant species within the Gesneriaceae family. It is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, Oreocharis flavovirens is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, or decoctions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
